title: Xtra Crunchy Canadian Minari Skillet
description: A hearty Canadian dish featuring minari, with a crunchy texture and a hint of mustard, all in one skillet. It is satvik-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the canola oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the mustard seeds and let them sizzle for 1 minute.
Add the chopped minari and cook until it is tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the cubed whole wheat bread and cook until it is toasted, about 3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the dijon mustard, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the mustard mixture over the minari and bread mixture, and stir to combine.
Add the water to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
